programs.title: Hello! NHK World Japan
programs.desc: . We intorduce the contents and activities of NHK WORLD-JAPAN to make the station and programs known to more people all over the world. This is the window of the station to the world.

programs.title: Nhk Newsline
programs.desc: . NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programs.title: Herbal Symphony
programs.desc: , Episode 1, Season 1. As spring arrives, Japan's oldest private herb garden in Uda, Nara Prefecture, bursts into life. This episode tells the story of the people who follow in the footsteps of their ancestors to preserve these herbs.

programs.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo 10min.
programs.desc: In squid-loving Japan, spear squid is immensely popular. Tag along with fishers in Hokkaido and savor some regional cuisine, fresh sushi, and a special take on a beloved Italian-inspired inky dish.

programs.title: Hometown Stories
programs.desc: . Every winter, a group of performers in Kikonai, Hokkaido drench themselves in freezing water in hopes of inviting a bountiful harvest and catch. We follow efforts to preserve this timeless ritual. Soness Stevens, Hiroyuki Hamada, Koji Okubo, Yusuke Ito.

programs.title: Satoyama Kitchen Spring
programs.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey through local cuisine, served with a side of seasonal scenery.
